hero.subtitleWithProjects_other: You have {{count}} active projects. Pick up where you left off.
hero.subtitleEmpty: Your workspace is ready. Create a project, invite your team, and start shipping.

gettingStarted.title: Get started
gettingStarted.subtitle: Complete these steps to unlock the full power of Paca.

createProject.title: Create your first project
createProject.description: Set up a scrumban board to manage your team's work.

inviteTeam.title: Invite your team
inviteTeam.description: Add human collaborators and assign roles.

configureAgent.title: Configure an AI agent
configureAgent.description: Connect an AI to handle tasks autonomously.

runSprint.title: Run your first sprint
runSprint.description: Move tasks through the Plan → Act → Check → Adapt cycle.

about.title: How Paca works
about.descriptionLead: Combine human creativity with AI speed on a shared scrumban board. Tasks flow through
about.descriptionTrail: with full transparency over who — human or AI — did what.

createDialog.title: New project
createDialog.description: Create a scrumban workspace for your team. You can invite members and configure settings after creation.

publicProject.label: Public project
publicProject.publicHint: Anyone with the link can view this project. Anonymous users have read-only access.
publicProject.privateHint: Only team members can access this project.

errors.nameTaken: A project with this name already exists.
errors.nameInvalid: Project name is empty or invalid.
errors.prefixInvalid: Prefix must be 1–10 uppercase letters/digits (e.g. PACA).
